zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Bolebec於1164年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾其其時，她的父親Hugh de Bolebec Baron of Whitchurch50歲，母親Margaret De Montfichet22歲。她於1207年與Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年2月3日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Bolebec was born in 1164, in Whitchurch, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Bolebec Baron of Whitchurch, was 50 and her mother, Margaret De Montfichet, was 22. She married Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford in 1207. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 3 February 1245, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Bolebec est née en 1164, à Whitchurch, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Bolebec Baron of Whitchurch, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Montfichet, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford en 1207. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1245, à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1207 Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1245 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Bolebecが1164年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウィトチャーチで生まれた時，父Hugh de Bolebec Baron of Whitchurchは50歳，母Margaret De Montfichetは22歳であった。1207年にRobert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年2月3日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Bolebec(이)가 1164년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 휘트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Bolebec Baron of Whitchurch(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Montfichet(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1207년 Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Bolebec родилась в 1164 г. в местности уичурч, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Bolebec Baron of Whitchurch было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Montfichet, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford в 1207 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 февраля 1245 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
